pivot_rule: After pixel conversion, place each local pivot at the geometric center of its keyed attachment surface. Do not use the visible-art bounding-box center as the pivot.
clearance_rule: No armor, cable, glow, outline, or effect may cross a keyed attachment boundary.

chassis.child_surface: internal torso shell and lower waist locks

arms.parent_surface: chassis left and right shoulder rings
arms.child_surface: arm proximal circular keyed shoulder sockets
arms.piece_layout: left/right pair separated in one logical-slot image

legs.parent_surface: chassis left and right hip locks
legs.child_surface: leg proximal circular keyed hip nodes
legs.piece_layout: left/right pair separated in one logical-slot image

weapon.child_surface: weapon rear or underside keyed rail block
weapon.pivot: center of the rail locking block

chipset.pivot: center of the rear edge connector

energy_cell.child_surface: cell rear keyed plug and lock lip
energy_cell.pivot: center of the keyed rear plug
